recovery_collar.rationale: Soft Elizabethan recovery cones for post-surgery use — distinct from regular collars (accessories) and recovery_shirt (body wrap). KVP EZ Soft line.

snuffle_toy.rationale: Scent / sniff / snuffle treat-finding toys (HUNTER Eiby Bola, KONG Layerz Forage line). 3 SKUs.

cat_hideout.rationale: Cat play tents/tunnels/caves — hideout structures with hanging catnip toys and lights. KONG Play Spaces line. 2 SKUs.

treat_dispenser.rationale: Treat-dispensing slow-feeder toys whose primary function is dispensing food/treats (vs. chew toys that happen to be stuffable). KONG Rewards line (Ball, Shell, Tennis, Tinker, Wally) and KONG Wobbler. ~9 SKUs.

horse.rationale: MEN FOR SAN MFE* prefix (equino). ~15 SKUs.

rodent.rationale: MEN FOR SAN MFR* + small-mammal products. Confirmed via Menforsan manufacturer pages: rodent products often span rabbits + ferrets.

rabbit.rationale: Products mentioning conejos. Often co-tagged with rodent + ferret (e.g. MEN FOR SAN small-mammal shampoos).

ferret.rationale: Products mentioning hurones. Often co-tagged with rodent + rabbit.
